items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Kaméleon:                Masterfully bluff, hide and reveal the secret word before your opponents doCamelon Party is an associative bluffing party game with secret roles that the whole family will enjoy. Players are dealt cards that tell them their role, which they must keep secret from others. If the player is a chameleon, he tries to figure out the secret word. If he is not a chameleon, he tries to find out who is a chameleon without giving away the secret word. The secret word for each round is determined by a roll of two dice - each player gets the coordinates to a specific word on the topic card, where there are 16 related words in total. Each player must now say a word that is related to the secret word - but the chameleon can only guess based on all 16 words on the theme card. After all players have expressed their opinions, a vote is taken to decide who is the chameleon. Can he guess the word and not give himself away to others? One game of this simple family game takes about 15 minutes. The game is...

items.raw_desc: Fali lámpa Immax PUNTO USB, flexibilis, kapcsolóval, fehér:Do you want a perfectly illuminated home or garage interior? If so, you'll want this IMMAX wall lamp. The material of the construction of the light is aluminium, metal and plastic. It is designed with a protection rating of IP20. It will hold any bulb with a thread of GU10 with a maximum power input of 9 W. You will have to buy a bulb, as the wall lamp does not come with one. The dimensions of the light are 5,5 × 47 × 8,5 cm. To work right, it will need to be hooked up to the electric grid.
